mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbound(outbound_no, type, material_id, warehouse_id, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, recipient, department, operator_id, remark, status) VALUES(#{outboundNo}, #{type}, #{materialId}, #{warehouseId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalAmount}, #{recipient}, #{department}, #{operatorId}, #{remark}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM outbound ORDER BY created_at DESC
